structural_conflicts: Both source skills want to own final answer authority for the same support domain.
contract_conflicts: One skill requires escalation before answer generation; the other permits answer generation before escalation.
The merged skill cannot preserve both output contracts without changing public behavior.
policy_conflicts: Sensitive-topic routing is user-safe only under the stricter escalation-first policy.
Allowing the permissive policy would weaken the original guaranteed safety boundary.
failure_reason: The merge would require choosing one authority model over the other, which is a product decision rather than a structural repair.
